Package com.example.passmanager

package com.example.passmanager
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AccountInstance
    Represents a single stored account entry in the password manager.
    AddAccountController
    JavaFX controller for AddAccountPupup.
    AES
    Class used to provide encryption dn decryption to the database and frontend.
    DBQueries
    This class is used to have a place where all SQL statements passed to the backend can live, although these are susceptible to SQL injections the next scope will be to change that
    HelloApplication
    JavaFX class that extends Application in order to be the entry point for the UI and allows the creation of stages and scenes on top of it
    Launcher
    The point where the application is loaded from
    MainScreenController
    This is used as the controller for the main screen of the application.
    ModelController
    This controller is used to handle account creation, logging in, and successful login attempts vs unsuccessful
    Session
    Holds the AES key for the entire app for the duration of a user session derived from initial log in The controllers can access the key without passing it through every method call.
    SignUp
    Represents the primary user account created during sign-up Extends AccountInstance with personal details (first name, last name, date of birth) and the salt used to derive the user's AES key.
